mapper.sql: co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON , co.LEARNING_MODEL_ID , co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.no as outputNo , ci.*
mapper.update: UPDATE CARD_OUTPUT co LEFT JOIN CARD_LEARNING_DATA cld ON co.TSTM_YMD = cld.TSTM_YMD AND co.TSTM_NO = cld.TSTM_NO AND co.BRCD = cld.BRCD SET co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, cld.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN END , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, CONCAT(cld.BRCD, '-', cld.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN END , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(cld.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN END WHERE co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL OR co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL OR co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT co.RSRE_YMD, co.HDQR_BOB_DCD, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, cd.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt1, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, CONCAT(cd.BRCD, '-', cd.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt2, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(cd.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt3, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, cd.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) > 0 AND INSTR(co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, CONCAT(cd.BRCD, '-', cd.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt4, SUM(CASE WHEN cd.ARIF_MDL_USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS arinUseCnt, IFNULL(totalOut.totalOutCnt, 0) AS totalOutputCnt FROM CARD_OUTPUT co INNER JOIN CARD_LEARNING_DATA cd ON co.TSTM_YMD = cd.TSTM_YMD AND co.TSTM_NO = cd.TSTM_NO AND co.BRCD = cd.BRCD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT co.RSRE_YMD, COUNT(*) AS totalOutCnt FROM CARD_OUTPUT co GROUP BY co.RSRE_YMD ) totalOut ON co.RSRE_YMD = totalOut.RSRE_YMD WHERE (co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL OR co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL OR co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL) GROUP BY co.RSRE_YMD, co.HDQR_BOB_DCD
